description: woodland - the giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. A vintage restyling of the classic sneaker, this shoe is a classic piece with a modern, sleek profile. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt. Upper Two tone, low-top synthetic upper with leather overlays and retro-themed stitch detail Central lace ups Outsole reinforced onto the upper on the heel region with branding Padded tongue Padded insole for in-step comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic TPU overlay on the toe box Midsole Rubber midsole Outsole Dual density TPU outsole with geometric grooves for grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not machine wash
